title: Pin Tooltips 📌
description: Adds the ability to pin tooltips to the screen and view more information from them such as enchantment and mob effect descriptions.
body:
# Pin Tooltips 📌

This mod adds the ability to pin tooltips to the screen and view more information from them such as enchantment and mob effect descriptions.

By default, when you stay on a tooltip for a while, it will be temporarily pinned until the cursor leaves.

Note: Pinned tooltips do not persist when you leave the game.

![Pin the tooltips, and view enchantment and effect descriptions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fFmpgMfg/images/4af97f04655f3246efe76e9ff4f4b4d9583b5cf1.gif)

### Keys (default):

- Left ALT: Pin the current tooltip
- Middle Button: Unpin the tooltip
- Left ALT + Middle Button: Unpin all tooltips

### Mod Integration:

When **Jade** installed, you can see which mod is the enchantment/effect from.

When **More Enchantment Info** installed, you can click on the enchantment text to open the recipe GUI.

When **Just Enough Effect Descriptions (JEED)** installed, you can click on the effect text to open the recipe GUI.

When **Tinkers Construct** installed, you can view the description of the traits on tooltips.

![Just Enough Effect Descriptions (JEED) integration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fFmpgMfg/images/094d57be1ac44a13f9940b2b4fe1872c84282aca.gif)

### Compatibility

| Mod                | Status                 | Note                                      |
|--------------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| Equipment Compare  | ✔️ Supported           |                                           |
| Obscure Tooltips   | ✔️ Partially supported | Components are not interactable           |
| Legendary Tooltips | ✔️ Partially supported | Title's interacting position is incorrect |
| Tooltips Reforged  | ❌ Not supported        |                                           |
| Immersive:Tooltip  | ❌ Not supported        |                                           |
| Tooltips Reforged  | ❌ Not supported        |                                           |
| EnhancedTooltips   | ❌ Not supported        |                                           |
| ModernUI           | ❌ Not supported        |                                           |
